name: Spice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and combine it with spices, baking powder, and salt.
2. Combine egg, sugar, melted shortening, and milk in a separate bowl.
3. Add dry ingredients to the wet mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Fill well-oiled muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15-20 minutes.
6. Yield: 12 servings.
